# Contribute to File Manager
## Add code
You can add your contribution by creating a fork of this project and add, fix or modify whatever you want. Then, make a pull request.
## Attriubte task
To attribute a task, please asign the user in a issue.
## Find bug or security breach
You can either create an issue, or contact administrators of this repository.
Here's a template of what an report should looks like : [report template](./SECURITY.md) 
## Guides or planification help
## Future of developpement
You can either create your own front-end app to interacte with the api or create it in this repository.
